plugin.title: JellyTrack
plugin.description: Sends playback events and media metadata to JellyTrack for analysis.
config.jellytrackUrl.label: JellyTrack URL
config.apiKey.label: API Key
config.heartbeatInterval.label: Heartbeat interval (seconds)
config.heartbeatInterval.description: Interval between each heartbeat sent to JellyTrack (default: 600 seconds)
config.progressInterval.label: PlaybackProgress interval (seconds)
config.progressInterval.description: Interval while playback is active (default: 5 seconds)
config.preferredLanguage.label: Preferred language (optional)
config.preferredLanguage.description: Select the UI language used by JellyTrack. Leave on 'Auto' to use Jellyfin's server language.
config.apiKey.description: The API key generated in JellyTrack settings (format: jt_xxxxxxxxxxxx)
config.fillFields: Please fill both the URL and the API key.
config.pausedProgressInterval.label: Paused interval (seconds)
config.pausedProgressInterval.descriptio: Interval while playback is paused (default: 30 seconds)
config.seekThreshold.label: Manual jump threshold (seconds)
config.seekThreshold.description: Minimum position jump reported as a manual skip or rewind (default: 20 seconds)
config.retryQueueSize.label: Maximum retry queue size
config.retryQueueSize.description: Maximum events kept locally while JellyTrack is unavailable (default: 500)
config.retryFlushBatchSize.label: Retry flush batch size
config.retryFlushBatchSize.description: Maximum events resent per flush when JellyTrack responds again (default: 50)
config.trackSeek: Capture manual skips and rewinds immediately
config.trackSessionEnded: Close playbacks when a session ends
task.heartbeat.name: JellyTrack Heartbeat
task.heartbeat.description: Sends a periodic heartbeat to JellyTrack with user and plugin health information.
